_comment: DeepSpeed ZeRO-2 config for LoRA SFT (Variant B, 8 x GPU).
_comment_why_not_z3: ZeRO-3 wraps nn.Module.__init__ with meta-tensor deferred init. UniLIP.__init__ calls SanaTransformer2DModel.from_pretrained() internally; those params land on real devices while ZeRO-3 expects meta tensors → NotImplementedError. ZeRO-2 keeps full params on each rank and avoids this entirely.
_comment_eff_batch: With 8 GPUs × per_device(1) × grad_accum(2) → effective batch = 16 (matches spec §A.7).
